allow:
Bash(source lib/runtime.sh
echo "== 候选监听端口 =="
ports="$\(discover_codex_debug_ports || true\)"
echo "${ports:-<none>}"
echo
echo "== 逐端口探测 /json/version =="
if [[ -z "${ports:-}" ]]; then
  echo "未发现任何 ChatGPT/Codex 监听端口"
else
  for p in $ports; do
    echo "--- 127.0.0.1:$p ---"
    curl -sS --max-time 3 "http://127.0.0.1:$p/json/version" 2>&1 | head -c 800 || echo "\(探测失败\)"
    echo
  done
fi)
